rawMetadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.30+commit.73712a01"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[],"devdoc":{"custom:math":"Stable Pool Curve The stable pool uses the curve: x\u00b3y + xy\u00b3 = k This provides lower slippage for similarly-priced assets (stablecoins, wrapped tokens). The math is more complex than volatile pools and uses Newton-Raphson iteration for output calculations.","details":"For volatile pools (xy = k curve), use AerodromServiceVolatile instead. This library provides functions for: - Swapping tokens in stable pools - Swap-deposit (zap in) to stable pools - Withdraw-swap (zap out) from stable pools - Quoting optimal swap amounts for balanced deposits All functions explicitly use `stable: true` for pool/router interactions.","kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"AerodromServiceStable","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Library for interacting with Aerodrome stable pools (x\u00b3y +
